title: Brown Paper Bags Strung - 12 x 12", 100 Pack, Takeaway Lunch Sandwich Fruit Pastry Sweets, 35gsm kraft material
features: Durable 35gsm Kraft Paper Bags – Made from brown kraft paper, these strung paper bags are lightweight yet strong enough for everyday packaging. Ideal for shops, cafes, bakeries, and market stalls looking for reliable and eco-friendly packaging.

Convenient Strung Design for Easy Use – Each lunch bag is pre-strung with durable cotton string, easy to hang and grab. Great for businesses that need quick, hassle-free packaging solutions while maintaining a professional presentation.

100% Recyclable – Manufactured from biodegradable kraft paper, these brown paper bags are plastic-free and fully recyclable. A sustainable alternative to single-use plastic bags, perfect for businesses wanting to reduce waste and show eco-conscious values.

Versatile Multi-Purpose Use – Suitable for food items like sandwiches, sweets, and snacks, as well as retail goods, small gifts, hardware, or craft supplies. These sandwich bags are ideal for both commercial and household use.

Simple & Professional Presentation – The natural brown kraft finish provides a clean, rustic look that suits all occasions. Whether used in shops, takeaways, events, or home storage, these paper takeaway bags combine practicality with an eco-conscious style.
description: Keep your products neatly packed and ready to go with our Brown Strung Paper Bags. Made from high-quality kraft paper, these bags are strong, reliable, and 100% recyclable – a perfect choice for eco-conscious businesses and everyday use. Each bag comes with a secure string tie, making it easy to seal, carry, or hang for storage. Whether you’re using them for food service, retail items, gifts, or packaging small essentials, these strung bags combine practicality with sustainability.
